subcodes.first_line: Thy wronged state hath grieved them that circle round the Most Great Throne. I swear by the Luminary of the horizon of inner meanings that from this oppression [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مظلومیتت سبب حزن طائفین عرش اعظم گشته قسم بنیر افق معانی که از این مظلومیت
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat]
